---defines---
QUALITY=2
---source---
#art FEATURE_A "desc" "BOOL"
#art FEATURE_B "desc" "INT"
#if FEATURE_A
int a = 1;
#endif
#if FEATURE_B
int b = 2;
#endif
#if QUALITY > 1
int c = 3;
#endif
---expected_line_active---
true, true, true, false, true, true, false, true, true, true, true
---expected_branch_count---
3
